failedAssertions.reason: Computed-font audits on dashboard/agents/issues each reported 6 visible-text violations using ui-monospace or ui-sans-serif instead of JetBrains Mono.
Observed status indicators are not consistently 6x6 and color mapping does not match spec (e.g., idle marker 10x10 with warn color; dashboard indicators include #ef4444/#f97316/#eab308/#3b82f6).
Only 4 section-label candidates matched 9-10px + 1px tracking; expected evidence target of 5+ labels was not met, and many uppercase labels are outside the required scale/spacing.
Hover changed background color on interactive elements (e.g., Dashboard nav link and issue row link changed from transparent to accent color).
Global CSS audit detected keyframes named spin/ping/pulse; contract disallows spin-style loading animations even though no active spinner elements were detected in DOM.
Status marker markup in agent rows uses a rounded-full status element sized 10x10 (not 6x6), so the full requirement was not met even though no emoji/img was found in inspected status rows.
Audited button instances are inconsistent with the primitive spec: multiple buttons have 0px border or 2px dashed border, and several use non-11px/non-uppercase styles.
Input has transparent background, 1px border, no radius, and appearance none, but font size is 14px instead of required 11px.

appliedUpdates.description: Added explicit Flow Validator Guidance: agent-browser section for safe concurrent GUI validation boundaries and evidence expectations.
Documented GUI validation frictions and workarounds: API interception for loading-state checks, eval fallback when get html @ref fails, and handling empty network-request captures.

frictions.description: Offline-mode reload failed with net::ERR_FAILED, so loading-state validation used temporary API request interception instead.
frictions.resolution: Applied agent-browser network route "**/api/**" --abort, captured screenshots/audit, then removed route and reloaded normally.

frictions.description: agent-browser get html with @ref failed (selector parsing); switched to eval-based DOM extraction for row markup evidence.
frictions.resolution: Used agent-browser eval scripts to capture outerHTML snippets and computed styles.

frictions.description: agent-browser network requests command returned no captured entries for this session.
frictions.resolution: Recorded style assertions with screenshots + computed-style audits; network evidence marked N/A.
